channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spain Celebrates World Cup Victory With Grand Parade In Madrid
item.description: Spain's World Cup-winning squad and coach Luis de la Fuente celebrated their historic victory with a vibrant parade through Madrid, drawing an estimated two million fans. The open-top bus procession, ...

item.title: Netflix series 'Operation Safed Sagar' highlights Indian Air Force's Kargil War heroism
item.description: The Netflix series 'Operation Safed Sagar' pays tribute to the bravery of an Indian Air Force squadron during the Kargil War, a conflict that took place in 1999 between India and Pakistan. The show, s...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Denies Starting Confrontation with China Coast Guard
item.description: Rear Admiral Jay Tarriela, spokesperson of the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) for the West Philippine Sea, refuted allegations by the Chinese Embassy that Filipino servicemen from the BRP Sierra Madre i...

item.title: Houthis Declare Red Sea Oil Route Blockade, Sparking US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The Iran-backed Houthis have declared a naval blockade on Saudi Arabia, escalating tensions in the Middle East and threatening global energy supplies. Despite diplomatic efforts to resume talks, the H...

item.title: Spain's World Cup Photo Excludes Trump, Sparking Global Reaction
item.description: Following Spain's 1-0 victory over Argentina in the FIFA World Cup final on July 19, 2026, President Donald Trump attempted to photobomb the trophy presentation ceremony. However, the Spanish Football...

item.title: Nathan Buckley addresses Tassie Devils' decision to appoint Ken Hinkley as inaugural coach
item.description: Former AFL captain Nathan Buckley has expressed his views on the Tasmania Devils' choice to name Ken Hinkley as their first head coach instead of himself. The decision has sparked discussions about le...

item.title: Saskatchewan Roughrider dies in fatal highway collision; alcohol and cannabis found in vehicle
item.description: Saskatchewan Roughriders' captain Jayden Dalke died in a fatal head-on collision on Highway 11 between Lumsden and Regina on July 20, 2026. The 30-year-old linebacker was driving northbound in the sou...

item.title: Domino's Expands into Burgers Amid Pizza Industry Growth
item.description: Domino's, the iconic pizza delivery chain, is making a strategic move into the burger market as it seeks to capitalize on the growing demand for convenience foods. The company, known for its rapid del...

item.title: Commonwealth Games 2026: Former Athletes Reflect on Legacy and Australia's Prospects
item.description: The 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow are set to take place after Victoria's withdrawal, with a streamlined format featuring 10 sports. Former athletes Johanna Griggs and Matt Shirvington, part of th...

item.title: Vijay's Final Role: 'Jana Nayagan' Trailer Reveals Vigilante Story
item.description: The Tamil movie 'Jana Nayagan' directed by H Vinoth is set to release on January 9, 2026. The trailer showcases Vijay in a vigilante role, marking what is reportedly his last acting project. The film ...

item.title: Benguet Eatery Ordered to Clarify Sale of Dog Meat
item.description: The La Trinidad municipal government in Benguet has directed a restaurant in Barangay Wangal to clarify why it should not face sanctions after the National Meat Inspection Service (NMIS) confirmed tha...

item.title: Former Liverpool and England Star Kevin Keegan Dies at 75 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Kevin Keegan, the legendary former Liverpool and England footballer, has passed away at the age of 75 after a courageous battle with cancer. His family announced his death on Monday, expressing profou...

item.title: BBC staff voice concerns over presenter salaries as job cuts and licence fee decline affect morale
item.description: BBC employees have expressed growing dissatisfaction with senior leadership following the publication of the broadcaster's latest list of highest-paid presenters. Anonymous staff members told The Inde...

item.title: Trump Shares Photo of JD Vance and Usha Vance's Newborn Son
item.description: President Donald Trump posted an image of Vice President JD Vance and second lady Usha Vance's newborn son, Alec Neel Vance, on Truth Social before the couple officially announced the birth. The Vance...

item.title: AI Enhances Legal Efficiency for Law Firms
item.description: Artificial intelligence is transforming legal services by automating routine tasks like document review, contract analysis, and legal research. Law firms are adopting AI tools to cut down on administr...

item.title: US Travel Warning Impacts International Travel for South Africans
item.description: The US Department of State has issued a worldwide travel advisory for American citizens, urging them to exercise increased caution due to heightened tensions in the Middle East. While the warning is s...

item.title: Opposition protests over NEET paper leak and Ayodhya donation theft disrupt opening day of Parliament's Monsoon Session
item.description: The opening day of Parliament's Monsoon Session was largely disrupted as repeated protests by Opposition parties led to multiple adjournments in both the Lok Sabha and the Rajya Sabha before proceedin...

item.title: Experts Highlight Egypt-EU Farming Deal and Climate Projects in Tanzania
item.description: The article discusses various developments across Tanzania, focusing on agricultural and environmental initiatives. Experts believe the Egypt-EU agreement will boost local farming by providing resourc...

item.title: WTA Introduces Genetic Testing for Female Tennis Players to Ensure Eligibility
item.description: The Women's Tennis Association (WTA) has implemented a new policy requiring players to undergo genetic testing to confirm their eligibility to compete in women's tennis. This follows a previous rule a...

item.title: Key Health Insights for Women Navigating Aging: Menstrual Health, Weight Management, and Beyond
item.description: The article explores critical health considerations for women as they age, emphasizing functional fitness over appearance. Experts caution against normalizing severe menstrual pain or unexplained weig...
